name: agent-workshop
description: Onboard repo-local AI agent scaffolding from Agent Workshop.

interface.longDescription: Agent Workshop gives Codex one onboarding skill that inspects a target repo, recommends repo-local agent adoption, and applies approved files. It does not expose the scaffold agents globally.
defaultPrompt: Plan Agent Workshop adoption for this repo.
Audit this repo's Agent Workshop setup.
Explain which agent packs fit this project.
